nodes.name: Improved Rifling
nodes.effect: All kinetic infantry weapons +8% accuracy at all ranges
nodes.notes: The foundation — makes Shock-Marines measurably more effective immediately

nodes.name: Heavy Caliber Rounds
nodes.effect: All kinetic weapons +10% damage, +5% armor penetration
nodes.notes: Raw damage increase across the board

nodes.name: Stabilized Platforms
nodes.effect: Vehicle and mech weapons +12% accuracy while moving (normally reduced)
nodes.notes: Allows Aegis-Walkers and Siege-Breakers to fire effectively during advance

nodes.name: Depleted Uranium Manufacturing
nodes.effect: Unlocks DU ammo (Rare: +30% dmg, irradiates zone). All kinetic weapons +5% crit chance.
nodes.notes: The premium ammo unlock — expensive but devastating

nodes.name: Magnetic Accelerator Technology
nodes.effect: Unlocks Magnetic Accelerator (hyper-velocity slugs penetrate multiple targets in a line). Ship MAC weapons +15% dmg.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — brute-force kinetic supremacy

nodes.name: Improved Field Repair Protocols
nodes.effect: Field Repair trigger threshold raised to 85% HP (heals more often, from the standard <75% to <85%)
nodes.notes: Direct upgrade to PRIMARY mechanic — activates healing earlier in every engagement

nodes.name: Advanced Repair Nanites
nodes.effect: Field Repair rate +50%: heals at 3% HP/sec instead of base 2%. Drone HP +50%.
nodes.notes: Stacks with the T1 threshold increase — faster healing AND more often

nodes.name: Hardened Composites
nodes.effect: All Terran armor equipment +15% HP. Fortress Plate and Reactive Plating benefits compounded.
nodes.notes: Raises the armor ceiling across the entire unit roster

nodes.name: Combat Medic Integration
nodes.effect: Field Repair now also affects adjacent friendly units at 50% effectiveness. AoE healing aura at 100px radius.
nodes.notes: Transforms solo-unit mechanic into battlefield-wide support system

nodes.name: Fortress Doctrine
nodes.effect: All Terran units +20% HP. All Terran buildings +40% HP. Fortified positions count as heavy cover.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — every Terran unit becomes a walking bunker

nodes.name: Supply Line Optimization
nodes.effect: Supply speed degradation reduced by 1 hop tier (3–4 hops = 100% instead of 75%). Reinforcement delivery −1 cycle for adjacent systems.
nodes.notes: Makes the already-fast Terran supply chain even faster

nodes.name: Advanced Logistics Network
nodes.effect: War Factory production speed +20%. Armada Phase access from Logistics Hub added 1 cycle earlier.
nodes.notes: More units, faster

nodes.name: Commander Doctrine Training
nodes.effect: All Commander aura radii +25%. Generals' command delay −1 cycle.
nodes.notes: Direct upgrade to delegation system

nodes.name: General Staff Protocol
nodes.effect: Generals' standing order switches cost 0 loyalty (normally 5). After-Action Reports +20% detail. General auto-resolve +5%.
nodes.notes: Reduces the cost of adapting strategy in the field

nodes.name: Strategic Command Network
nodes.effect: All Terran Generals share intel galaxy-wide in real-time. All General stat bonuses in their sector +15%. Global auto-resolve +15%.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — Generals become a coordinated, galaxy-spanning hive mind

nodes.name: Prototype Weapons Lab
nodes.effect: Cross-faction reverse-engineering +25% faster. Black Market equipment refresh +1 per cycle.
nodes.notes: Opens cross-faction tech adoption pipeline

nodes.name: Titan Activation Protocol
nodes.effect: Unlocks Titan-Class Leviathan production. 6 cycles at Advanced War Factory. Doubles repair drone pool within 200m of deployed Leviathan.
nodes.notes: The mobile fortress — enormously expensive, but game-changing on the ground

nodes.name: Nova-Class Construction
nodes.effect: Unlocks Nova-Dreadnought flagship. Requires orbital Shipyard + 8 cycles. Spinal MAC calibrated on construction.
nodes.notes: The MAC gun — the ultimate capital ship in the galaxy

nodes.name: Hybrid Ammunition Research
nodes.effect: Unlocks Hybrid Rounds (Legendary: +15% vs BOTH Vorax AND Guardians, +5% all other targets). 1 set per 5 cycles per War Factory.
nodes.notes: The dual-purpose endgame solution — essential when fighting two fronts

nodes.name: Project Overlord
nodes.effect: Commander: +20% HP, +15% dmg, +10% aura radius. Starting CP per battle = 4 (↑ from 3). All CP abilities +10% effectiveness.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — Commander becomes a one-person army with enhanced battle control
